tooltipTurnView: View scene state for this turn
tooltipTurnPinnedEmpty: Pinned: no tracker data for this turn
panelNoData: No tracker data for this turn.
panelEmptyEmptySession: This conversation has no turns yet.
panelEmptyNoDataHistory: No tracker data for this turn.
panelEmptyAwaitingReply: Waiting for the model to return tracker data…
panelEmptyNoBlock: The model did not return a tracker block (<ex-trace-keeper>).
panelEmptySnapshotMissing: Tracker was not saved to this turn snapshot.
panelEmptyRenderFailed: Panel template render failed; check your bundle template.
notifyPatchInvalidJson: Invalid JSON (must be a JSON object)
notifyRegenerateFailedDebugHint: Regenerate failed: {code} (see browser console for details)
notifyEditNoState: No editable tracker state for this turn
injectionOrderDefaultDesc: Post-user merge order for Together tracker system. Default 500 (closer to stack bottom).
activeBundleIdDesc: Pick from saved bundles below; built-in sample is always available
apiConfigIdDesc: API preset for Separate tracker regeneration; leave empty to inherit conversation plugin settings, global plugin settings, or the global default preset.
bundleListDesc: Add or edit TraceBundles: name, system prompt, sample JSON, Handlebars template, and stylesheet. Bundle ids are assigned automatically.
bundleItemSystemPromptDesc: System instruction for Together chat injection; server appends sample structure after this
bundleItemSeparateSystemPromptDesc: System instruction placed after dialogue history for Separate regenerate; server appends JSON template after this
separateSystemPromptTemplateDefault:
Based on the conversation history above, infer the current scene state.
Refer to the JSON template below and reply with a single JSON object only.
Do not include markdown fences, XML tags, or roleplay prose.
bundleItemSampleStateDesc: JSON shape the model should follow; leave empty to keep built-in or merged value
validateSampleStateJsonDesc: When enabled, invalid sample JSON is highlighted under the field and blocks save
bundleItemTemplateDesc: Left drawer template with data and meta in context
bundleItemStylesheetDesc: CSS injected into the sidebar panel
sampleStateInvalidJson: Sample state JSON is invalid (must be a JSON object)
systemPromptTemplateDefault:
You are maintaining a structured RP scene state for the Trace Keeper plugin.
After your in-character reply, append a block: <ex-trace-keeper>{pure JSON}</ex-trace-keeper>.
The JSON must match the sample structure below. Update fields to reflect the current scene; do not copy sample placeholder values verbatim.
bundleTemplateDefault:
Scene tracker

Location
{{data.scene.location}}
Time
{{data.scene.time}}
Weather
{{data.scene.weather}}
Mood
{{data.mood}}
{{#if data.notes}}

{{data.notes}}

{{/if}}

epoch {{meta.epoch}}{{#if meta.turnOrdinal}} · turn {{meta.turnOrdinal}}{{/if}}
convApiConfigIdDesc: Leave empty to inherit global plugin settings, then the global default preset. Separate regenerate uses the same chain.
convBundleIdDesc: Leave empty to inherit user default or built-in sample
separateTurnCountDesc: 1–8. Turns sent for Separate regenerate (includes target). Historical state comes from <ex-trace-keeper> blocks in assistant text (aligned with regex skipLastNTurns).
convSeparateTurnCountDesc: Leave empty to inherit user default
